# Coins

## Tags
money, cash, finance, gamble

## Categories
gaming

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/coins)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::Coins;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        Coins { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
